claim_text: Problem definition and motivation map to 01_problem_and_motivation.md.
Proposed method maps to 03_method.md with related-work support from 02_related_work.md.
Data and implementation maps to 04_data_and_implementation.md.
Results map to 06_results.md with experiment support from 05_experiments.md.
Discussion maps to 07_discussion_and_limitations.md.
FInk is framed as Contractual Financial Review Priority, not a legal verdict.
Paper-visible artifacts must exclude real contracts, private corpus text, raw filenames, token values, model weights, ZIPs, PDFs, and unsanitized data.
A0-A2 official records can ground score-eligible signals; B/C practice references do not contribute scoring evidence.
The paper uses DFL-inspired wording and does not claim end-to-end decision-focused training.
Measured values are scoped to synthetic/sanitized local fixtures and are not generalized deployment-performance claims.
The risk suite reports rule_only, model_only, and hybrid ablation arms without a generalized optimality claim.
